WHAT WE DO

Our Services

Seven specialized IT practice areas delivering enterprise-grade technology solutions — from cybersecurity to AI & automation. Built for performance, security, and scale.

Start a Conversation Explore Services
OUR PRACTICE AREAS

Seven Core Service Areas

From infrastructure security to intelligent automation — our seven practice areas cover every dimension of enterprise technology.

Cybersecurity

Protect your business with enterprise-grade threat detection, compliance, and zero-trust architecture.

Learn More →

Project Management

Deliver projects on time and within budget with PMP-certified managers and agile methodology.

Learn More →

Full Stack Development

Modern web and application development from React front-ends to cloud-native back-ends.

Learn More →

AWS Cloud Solutions

Scalable cloud infrastructure, migrations, and managed services on Amazon Web Services.

Learn More →

Java Development

Robust enterprise Java applications with Spring Boot, microservices, and high-performance engineering.

Learn More →

Quality Assurance & Testing

Comprehensive manual and automated testing to ensure flawless, high-quality software releases.

Learn More →

AI & Automation Services

ML pipelines, RPA, and AI-powered workflows that reduce manual effort and surface actionable insights.

Learn More →

Custom Engagement

Need a tailored solution spanning multiple areas? Our team designs bespoke engagements to fit your needs.

Talk to Us →
DEEP DIVE

What's Included in Each Service

A closer look at the capabilities, deliverables, and expertise behind each practice area.

01

Cybersecurity

End-to-end security programs covering risk assessment, threat detection, incident response, and regulatory compliance. Our certified professionals implement zero-trust architecture, IAM frameworks, and 24/7 SOC monitoring to keep your business protected against evolving threats.

  • Threat detection & incident response (SOC 24/7)
  • Zero-trust architecture & IAM frameworks
  • Compliance programs: HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOC 2, ISO 27001
  • Penetration testing & vulnerability assessments
  • Cloud security posture management (CSPM)
Learn More →
02

Project Management

PMP-certified project managers leading complex IT initiatives using Agile, Scrum, and hybrid delivery frameworks. We provide resource planning, risk management, stakeholder communication, and executive-level reporting across single projects and full program portfolios.

  • Agile, Scrum & hybrid project delivery
  • Resource planning & risk management
  • Stakeholder communication & executive reporting
  • Budget tracking & timeline management
  • Program portfolio management
Learn More →
03

Full Stack Development

End-to-end web and mobile application development using React, Angular, Node.js, Python, and Java. We architect microservices, RESTful and GraphQL APIs, and integrate CI/CD pipelines with automated testing to deliver production-grade software at speed.

  • React, Angular & Vue frontend development
  • Node.js, Python & Java backend engineering
  • RESTful APIs, GraphQL & microservices architecture
  • CI/CD pipeline setup & DevOps integration
  • Mobile-responsive & PWA development
Learn More →
04

AWS Cloud Solutions

AWS-certified architects designing, migrating, and operating your cloud infrastructure. Services include cloud migration strategy, serverless architecture, cost optimization, auto-scaling, and DevOps toolchain setup with Terraform, CodePipeline, and Ansible.

  • Cloud migration strategy & execution
  • Serverless architecture: Lambda, ECS/EKS
  • Infrastructure as Code: Terraform & CloudFormation
  • Cost optimization & reserved capacity planning
  • Managed services & 24/7 cloud operations
Learn More →
05

Java Development

Battle-tested Java engineers building high-performance enterprise applications with Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, and Jakarta EE. We specialize in microservices architectures, event-driven systems with Kafka, legacy modernization, and JVM performance tuning.

  • Spring Boot & Spring Cloud microservices
  • Event-driven architecture with Apache Kafka
  • Legacy Java system modernization
  • JVM performance tuning & profiling
  • Jakarta EE & enterprise integration patterns
Learn More →
06

Quality Assurance & Testing

Comprehensive QA programs encompassing manual and automated testing with Selenium, Cypress, and Playwright. We deliver performance testing via JMeter, API validation, mobile testing, and security scanning — all managed in TestRail and JIRA.

  • Automated testing: Selenium, Cypress & Playwright
  • Performance & load testing with JMeter
  • API validation with Postman & REST Assured
  • Mobile testing via Appium & BrowserStack
  • Security scanning & OWASP compliance checks
Learn More →
07

AI & Automation Services

Intelligent automation and AI solutions using TensorFlow, PyTorch, and UiPath. We build ML model pipelines, conversational AI and LLM-powered chatbots, Robotic Process Automation (RPA) workflows, predictive analytics dashboards, and MLOps infrastructure to accelerate business outcomes.

  • ML pipelines with TensorFlow & PyTorch
  • LLM-powered chatbots & conversational AI
  • Robotic Process Automation (RPA) with UiPath
  • Predictive analytics & business intelligence
  • MLOps infrastructure & model deployment
Learn More →

HOW WE WORK

Our Delivery Process

A proven, five-step delivery model that keeps you informed and in control at every stage.

STEP 01

Discover

We deeply understand your business goals, technical environment, and success criteria before proposing any solution.

→

STEP 02

Plan

Our architects create a clear roadmap, define the technology stack, allocate resources, and set measurable milestones.

→

STEP 03

Build

Agile sprints with regular demos, rigorous code reviews, and transparent status updates throughout the build phase.

→

STEP 04

Test

Comprehensive QA, performance testing, security scanning, and user acceptance testing before every release.

→

STEP 05

Deploy

Zero-downtime deployments, post-launch monitoring, 24/7 support, and continuous improvement cycles.

Ready to Get Started?

Partner with Ekan Solutions Inc. to accelerate your technology initiatives with proven expertise and a client-first approach.

Contact Us (832) 295-0408

Enterprise IT solutions built on integrity, innovation, and 15+ years of expertise. Securing, scaling, and accelerating your business.
